text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O and I are training<n>outside, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me... You're T.M. Opera O,<n>aren't you?
I'm a huge fan!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well, now! You must have an eye for<n>aesthetics!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall reward it with a special copy of<n>my new
headshot I took just<n>yesterday.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Not a single one! Where could they<n>have all gone?!
choice_data_list: Didn't you just pass out a big stack of them?
Didn't you just pass out a big stack of them?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, what have I done?! That was the<n>entire
stock?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry. Please, would you<n>accept my
autograph for now?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The fan looks overjoyed to get an<n>autograph, but
Opera O is in utter<n>despair.
